ga4.label: GA4 focus
ga4.plan_line: Google Analytics 4 for site analytics — page views, sessions, users, engagement, conversions.
ga4.base_notes: Query the GA4 Data API via the official Google Analytics MCP server (report-style queries: dimensions + metrics over a date range, plus realtime and funnel reports). Authenticated read-only with the analytics.readonly scope — it cannot edit GA4 configuration. Note GA4 sampling and thresholding on large properties; the BigQuery export is the unsampled alternative when available.
